div.div:
GenePage
• Cabeçalho + links externos
(NCBI, gnomAD, UniProt, AlphaFold)
• Grid de metadados Ensembl
• StatCards (total/path./VUS/benign)
• ConstraintMetrics (pLI, LOEUF)
• GeneLocusHeatmap (bins 1kb)
• ProteinViewer 3D — NGL
(Cartoon / Surface / Ball+Stick / Ribbon)
• Imagem PAE (AlphaFold)
• VariantTable (path./VUS/benignas)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.div:
VariantPage
• Cabeçalho + SignificanceBadge
• Grid de metadados VEP
• ScoreDetail (SIFT, PolyPhen-2)
• PredictionScoresRadar
(SIFT / PolyPhen / CADD / REVEL)
• FrequencyBarChart (escala log)
• GeographicVariantMap
(mapa mundial, 9 populações)
• Tabela de frequências populacionais

div.div:
Visualizações — Plotly.js + NGL
• scattergeo → mapa de frequências
• bar (log) → frequências populacionais
• scatterpolar → radar de escores
• barras empilhadas → heatmap locus
• CSS gauges → métricas de restrição
• NGL → estrutura 3D proteína (PDB)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 340px; height: 1px; padding-top: 508px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Router — GET /api/gene/{symbol}
1. validate_gene_symbol() — regex HGNC
2. cache_get(gene:{symbol}) — Redis
3. ensembl.get_gene_info() — sequencial
4. asyncio.gather() — paralelo:
• get_gene_variants(gene_id)
• get_gene_constraint(symbol)
• get_uniprot_id(symbol)
5. alphafold.get_prediction(uniprot_id)
6. classify_clinical_significance()
7. GeneResponse (Pydantic v2)
8. cache_set(TTL 3600s)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 340px; height: 1px; padding-top: 508px; margin-left: 406px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Router — GET /api/variant/{rsid}
1. validate_rsid() — regex rs[0-9]+
2. cache_get(variant:{rsid}) — Redis
3. ensembl.get_vep_annotation(rsid)
4. asyncio.gather() — paralelo:
• gnomad.get_variant_frequencies()
• clinvar.get_variant_clinvar()
5. VariantResponse (Pydantic v2)
6. cache_set(TTL 3600s)

get_variant_frequencies()

→ 9 populações (IDs minúsculos)
get_gene_constraint()
→ pli, oe_lof_upper (LOEUF)
GraphQL — timeout 30s

get_prediction(uniprot_id)
→ response é array → usa [0]
→ pdbUrl (estrutura 3D)
→ paeImageUrl (mapa PAE)
→ globalMetricValue (pLDDT)

→ organism_id: 9606 (humano)
